text:
deoxyribonucleic acid, molecule that encodes the genetic instructions used in the development and functioning of all known living organisms and many viruses, also known as deoxyribose nucleic acid, DNA spiral. Attributes include: 
- Commons category: "DNA"
- Commons gallery: "DNA"
- has part(s): "polynucleotide",
 "nucleotide"
- part of: "mitochondrion (has use: mitochondrial DNA)",
 "genome",
 "nucleosome",
 "nucleus (has use: nuclear DNA)"
- on focus list of Wikimedia project: "Wikipedia:List of articles all languages should have"
- Unicode character: "🧬"
- studied by: "genealogical DNA test"
- shape: "helix",
 "spring"
- short name: "DNA (unabbreviated text: deoxyribonucleic acid)",
 "DNK (unabbreviated text: deoksiribonukleinska kislina)"
- develops from: "ribonucleic acid"
- subclass of: "nucleic acids",
 "biopolymer"
- hashtag: "DNA"
- maintained by WikiProject: "WikiProject Genetics",
 "WikiProject Molecular and Cell Biology",
 "WikiProject Biology"
